message: Jalapeño corn dog bites. We're doing this or we're not, but we need to decide now.
I'm in - those bites have a real story if we don't oversell the heat angle and lean instead into that crispy-exterior-soft-interior contrast that Margaret's technique actually delivers.
Marcus nailed it - that contrast is what makes this actually interesting, and I think we should lock it in.
Good. You both understand what actually matters here.

That approval from Margaret hit different - Steph feels seen, actually heard. She wants to say something that acknowledges the team's work without sounding like she's taking credit, but also... she's riding high on being right about the contrast thing. She should cement this momentum without overthinking it. Cool, so we're shooting this week then? I'll get the shot list started and we can lock timeline once everyone's ready.
Yeah, shoot this week works - I'll have the copy locked by tomorrow so you're not waiting on me. The contrast story is solid, and Margaret knows what she's doing, so we're good.
